class.name: GDKAchievements
class.description: Wraps the Xbox Achievements Manager. Query and update achievements for signed-in users. Achievement requests return completion [Signal] values that resolve after [method GDK.dispatch] pumps the manager state.

method.name: query_player_achievements_async
method.description: Queries all achievements for the specified [param user]. Await the returned completion [Signal] to receive the final [GDKResult]. Results are cached and accessible via [method get_cached_achievements].

method.name: update_achievement_async
method.description: Updates the progress of an achievement for the specified [param user]. Set [param percent_complete] to 100 to unlock. Await the returned completion [Signal] to receive the final [GDKResult].

method.name: get_cached_achievements
method.description: Returns an [Array] of cached [GDKAchievement] objects for the specified [param user]. Call [method query_player_achievements_async] first to populate the cache.

signal.name: achievement_unlocked
signal.description: Emitted when an achievement is unlocked for the [param user].

signal.name: achievements_updated
signal.description: Emitted when the achievement cache has been updated for the [param user].

signal.name: runtime_error
signal.description: Emitted when an unsolicited Achievements Manager subsystem error occurs (for example a failure inside [code]XblAchievementsManagerDoWork[/code]). Caller-driven failures are returned via the awaited completion [Signal] of the relevant [code]_async[/code] method.
